title: State of Emergency COVID-19: Finance Regulations
title_en: State of Emergency COVID-19: Finance Regulations

provisions.title: Suspension of certain provisions of section 9 of Act No. 31 of 1991
provisions.content: Despite the provisions of section 9(2) of the State Finance Act, 1991 (Act No. 31 of 1991 ), the Minister of Finance is empowered to authorise the withdrawal of an amount of money exceeding three percent of the total amount appropriated by the current Appropriation Act for the period from 9 April 2020 to 30 June 2020 in order to defray expenditure on services of a special nature as contemplated in section 9(1)(b)(ii) of the said Act. History of this document 20 April 2020 this version Published in Government Gazette 7182 Commenced 15 April 2020 Assented to Related documents [] [] [] [] ▲ To the top > Contact us Visit our Facebook Page Visit our Twitter/X profile About NamibLII NamibLII is a project of the Law Reform and Development Commission managed by the Directorate: Law Reform of the Ministry of Justice of the Republic of Namibia. In terms of the Law Reform and Development Commission Act, 1991 (Act No. 29 of 1991), the Commission is mandated to consolidate or codify any branch of the law or to introduce other measures aimed at making the law more readily accessible. NamibLII is the embodiment of this mandate making annotated statutes, judgments, and gazettes available in a user-friendly format.
